name: Topgolf Panama City Beach
address: 15475 Topgolf Way, Panama City Beach, FL 32413
about: Topgolf Panama City Beach is an entertainment venue featuring a climate-controlled golf simulation facility with multiple hitting bays. The facility offers year-round comfort with cooling fans in summer and heated bays in winter, with HDTVs in every bay and throughout the sports bar and restaurant. Guests can use complimentary clubs or their own, with high-tech balls that automatically score by hitting targets in the outfield. The venue operates with a flexible pricing model and offers various promotions and event hosting options for groups of all sizes.
why_golfers_like_it: HDTVs in every bay and throughout the venue
Variety of games and promotional offers

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar and restaurant available with various options including vegetarian and gluten-free choices

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary clubs are provided, but you can use your own if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and beverages are not permitted due to health and safety practices, with the exception of store-bought cakes for birthdays or celebrations.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes varies depending on the game chosen and number of players, but typical gameplay ranges from 30 minutes to 2 hours per round.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children are welcome with age policies: anyone under 16 must be supervised by a guest 21+ at all times, and anyone under 18 must be supervised by a guest 21+ after 9PM.
